Test Beta Windows Release
Version: 1.0.0

Files:
- TestBetaSetup-1.0.0.exe: installer build that creates shortcuts and includes an uninstall path.
- TestBetaApp-1.0.0.exe: portable standalone desktop app build.

Desktop app hotkeys:
- F1 About dialog
- F11 window fullscreen
- Esc exits window fullscreen

In-game controls:
- WASD move
- Mouse look
- Q / E backup turn
- Space or left click fire
- F request fullscreen
- [ and ] tune mouse sensitivity
- R restart
